title: Valkyrien Speed Limiter
description: A simple and lightweight minecraft mod to limit the speed of your VS ships!
body:
### Valkyrien Speed Limiter
### 
A simple and lightweight addon for the Valkyrien Skies mod, allowing you to set the max speed of Ships (physics objects)!

I made this mod since fast moving ships can cause performance issues, and chunks cant keep up with the speed of ships. This mod helps alot especially on servers where you have alot of planes or other ships that move fast. (Wow, genuis explanation I know)

Max speed can be changed in instance/config/VSspeedlimiter-common.toml


Note that this is my first mod, so there will be bugs. If you experience any issues please report it in the Discord. https://discord.gg/b8dshmybfH
